'''zhajubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:raasclaat|raasclaat]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-j-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:raasclaat|raasclaat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhajubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæjibith|zhæjibith]] || [[word:zhæjibij|zhæjibij]] || [[word:zhæjibish|zhæjibish]] || [[word:zhæjibi|zhæjibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhajujubuth|zhajujubuth]] || [[word:zhajujubuj|zhajujubuj]] || [[word:zhajujubush|zhajujubush]] || [[word:zhajujubu|zhajujubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhajubuth|zhajubuth]] || [[word:zhajubuj|zhajubuj]] || [[word:zhajubush|zhajubush]] || [[word:zhajubu|zhajubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhajufbuth|zhajufbuth]] || [[word:zhajufbuj|zhajufbuj]] || [[word:zhajufbush|zhajufbush]] || [[word:zhajufbuf|zhajufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhajubuthu|zhajubuthu]] || [[word:zhajubuju|zhajubuju]] || [[word:zhajubushu|zhajubushu]] || [[word:zhajubuku|zhajubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhajubuth|zhajubuth]] || [[word:zhajubuj|zhajubuj]] || [[word:zhajubush|zhajubush]] || [[word:zhajubu|zhajubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhajubuthul|zhajubuthul]] || [[word:zhajubujul|zhajubujul]] || [[word:zhajubushul|zhajubushul]] || [[word:zhajubukul|zhajubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhajubuthuthu|zhajubuthuthu]] || [[word:zhajubujuju|zhajubujuju]] || [[word:zhajubushushu|zhajubushushu]] || [[word:zhajubuku|zhajubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhajubuthun|zhajubuthun]] || [[word:zhajubujun|zhajubujun]] || [[word:zhajubushun|zhajubushun]] || [[word:zhajubukun|zhajubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhajubuthuoro|zhajubuthuoro]] || [[word:zhajubujuoro|zhajubujuoro]] || [[word:zhajubushuoro|zhajubushuoro]] || [[word:zhajubukuoro|zhajubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
